zh.Burton Dassett, Warwickshire, England: 英國瓦維其可爾伯頓 達瑟特
zh.Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England: 英國格盧斯特斯爾素德勒
zh.lifeSummary: 當Knight Ralph de Sudeley於1192年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾素德勒時，他的父親Ralph de Sudeley30歲，母親Isabel Stafford fitzPiers26歲。他和Imenia Isabel Corbet至少有3個兒子。他去世於1241年3月19日享年49歲，埋葬在英國諾圖恩布利亞。

zh-hans.Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England: 英国格盧斯特斯爾素德勒
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Knight Ralph de Sudeley于1192年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾素德勒时，他的父亲Ralph de Sudeley30岁，母亲Isabel Stafford fitzPiers26岁。他和Imenia Isabel Corbet至少有3个儿子。他去世于1241年3月19日享年49岁，埋葬在英国諾圖恩布利亞。

nameMeanings.name: Sudeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Sudeley (Gloucs) or Soudley in East Dean (Gloucs).

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Knight Ralph de Sudeley was born in 1192, in Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Ralph de Sudeley, was 30 and his mother, Isabel Stafford fitzPiers, was 26. He had at least 3 sons with Imenia Isabel Corbet. He died on 19 March 1241, at the age of 49, and was buried in Northumbria, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Knight Ralph de Sudeley est né en 1192, à Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph de Sudeley, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Isabel Stafford fitzPiers, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Imenia Isabel Corbet. Il est décédé le 19 mars 1241, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Northumbria, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Knight Ralph de Sudeley 1192 in Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de Sudeley 30 und seine Mutter Isabel Stafford fitzPiers 26. Er hatte mit Imenia Isabel Corbet mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 19. März 1241 im Alter von 49 Jahren und wurde in Northumbria, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Knight Ralph de Sudeley è nato il nel 1192 nel Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Ralph de Sudeley, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Stafford fitzPiers, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli con Imenia Isabel Corbet. Morì il 19 marzo 1241, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Northumbria, England.

ja.Priory of Erdburis, Northumbria, England: イギリスノースウンブリア
ja.Burton Dassett, Warwickshire, England: イギリスワーウィクシュアイアブルトン ダセット
ja.Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England: イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアスデリー
ja.lifeSummary: Knight Ralph de Sudeleyが1192年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアスデリーで生まれた時，父Ralph de Sudeleyは30歳，母Isabel Stafford fitzPiersは26歳であった。彼はImenia Isabel Corbetとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼は1241年3月19日に49歳で死去し，イギリスノースウンブリアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Knight Ralph de Sudeley(이)가 1192년 영국 그루스스터실르 수데리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Sudeley(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Stafford fitzPiers(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Imenia Isabel Corbet(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1241년 3월 19일 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르스브리아에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Knight Ralph de Sudeley nasceu em 1192, em Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph de Sudeley, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Stafford fitzPiers, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Imenia Isabel Corbet. Ele faleceu em 19 de março de 1241, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Northumbria, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Knight Ralph de Sudeley родился в 1192 г. в местности судели, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph de Sudeley было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Stafford fitzPiers, 26. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Imenia Isabel Corbet. Он умер 19 марта 1241 г. в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности нортумбря, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Knight Ralph de Sudeley nació en 1192, en Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph de Sudeley, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Isabel Stafford fitzPiers, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Imenia Isabel Corbet. Murió el 19 de marzo de 1241, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Northumbria, Inglaterra.
